yt_title: Scott Harrison, Charity: Water & philanthropic entrepreneurship

business_ideas.idea: Charity: Water: nonprofit model where 100% of donations go to water projects, overhead funded separately
Birthday donation campaign: get people to donate on their birthday instead of receiving gifts
Bitcoin Water Trust: accept Bitcoin donations held in cold storage until 2025+ for potential appreciation
The Spring: monthly subscription community model ($30/month average) for recurring donations

predictions.text: Charity: Water is in second inning; needs to reach 47x current impact to help all without clean water
90% of value creation in any mission-driven business happens in years 21-27 of operation (long-term thinking)
Subscription model for recurring donations is superior to annual fundraising restart cycle
